text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Wednesday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, January 01. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll monitor the sleep metrics tonight.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I've noted that. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Let's break this down. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Researching rover power systems in depth. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I've indexed the research notes. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Calculating some savings estimates. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Glad we are staying on top of this.
title: Finance Update

text: Refinancing is a great leverage point. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. Mrs. Patterson says he is reading at a 3rd grade advanced grade level now. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's wonderful. That's fantastic. We should continue his daily reading routine to support his growth. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great consistency with running. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Just wanted to mention that prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. I've noted that. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Let's monitor the error rates over the next sprint.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. Greg Holloway wants to drop scheduling portal to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Understood. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of scheduling portal now and iterating later is a good compromise. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Bedtime can be a challenge. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: I checked the telemetry feeds. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Looking over our mortgage options. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Got it, Mike. Smart financial planning. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Made good progress on my work tasks today. Tuned my local LLM settings and fits scrapers. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal summary recorded. Have a peaceful night.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
